home.welcomeGuest: Welcome to the web application of {organizationName}. Manage members, events, documents and more.

dashboard.title: Dashboard & KPIs
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of members, events, and finances.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.noProfileFound: No member profile found. Please contact the board.
profile.noProfileMessageAdmin: Your account has no member record in this app because it is an admin or board account. We only manage personal data for members. You can still view your security and session settings or go to the admin area.
profile.noProfileMessageMember: We could not find a member record for your account yet. Please contact the board so your profile can be created. You can still open your security and session settings.
profile.emailCannotBeChanged: Email address cannot be changed. Contact the board if needed.
profile.consentNewsletterDesc: Receive association newsletters and updates via email.

subtitle.exactMatch: A member with this email address already exists. Saving is blocked.
subtitle.likelyMatch: These members look similar. Review before saving.

duplicates.title: Duplicate Members Review
duplicates.subtitle: All duplicate-candidate groups detected across the member table. Resolve via merge or dismiss as a false positive.

duplicates.groupSummary: {count, plural, =1 {1 member} other {# members}} in this group

empty.title: All clean

dismiss.errorSelectPair: Select two different members to dismiss.

modal.title: Mark group as NOT a duplicate
modal.description: Records every pair within this group so the group never appears on the duplicates page again. Cannot be undone in this UI.
modal.reasonPlaceholder: Why are these people NOT the same?

modal.title: Merge members
modal.description: The source member is soft-retired and all references move to the target. Action is one-way.
modal.targetPickerHint: The other selected member becomes the source and is soft-retired.
modal.confirmFinance: I confirm draft invoices on the source will be reassigned to the target.
modal.confirmKeycloak: I confirm the source Keycloak link will be cleared (if both have one).
modal.errorPickPair: Pick a target and a source member.

retention.title: Retention Policies
retention.subtitle: Data retention and archival according to legal requirements
retention.description: Manage retention periods and archival rules
retention.infoText: Retention policies define how long data is kept and what happens after expiration. Changes to legally required periods (e.g. OR Art. 958f) should only be made after consultation with the board.

settings.logoInvalid: Invalid file type or file too large (max 1 MB)

finance.title: Finance

settingsHub.subtitle: Manage all finance settings and configurations in one place.
settingsHub.profileDesc: Configure organization details, jurisdiction, currency, and bank information.
settingsHub.accountsDesc: Manage bank accounts and cash accounts for bookkeeping.
settingsHub.categoriesDesc: Manage income and expense categories for transactions.
settingsHub.taxCodesDesc: Configure VAT rates and tax codes for invoices.
settingsHub.invoiceTemplatesDesc: Manage templates for different invoice types and jurisdictions.
settingsHub.activityAreasDesc: Manage activity areas for categorizing transactions.
settingsHub.exportsDesc: Export journal entries and open items as CSV files.
settingsHub.bankImportDesc: Import bank statements and automatically match payments.
settingsHub.ledgerAccountsDesc: Manage general ledger accounts for double-entry bookkeeping.
settingsHub.postingMappingsDesc: Configure automatic mapping of categories and accounts to ledger accounts.
settingsHub.journalEntriesDesc: View, create and post debit/credit journal entries.
settingsHub.accountingReportsDesc: View trial balance, balance sheet and profit & loss statement.
settingsHub.doubleEntryActive: Double-entry bookkeeping is active. All features are available.
settingsHub.doubleEntryInactive: Double-entry bookkeeping is not active. Enable it in the Finance Profile to use these features.
settingsHub.backfillDesc: Creates journal entries (debit/credit) for all existing transactions and payments that have not yet been posted. Already posted entries are skipped (idempotent).
settingsHub.backfillCutOffHint: Leave empty to process all entries from the beginning.
settingsHub.backfillSuccess: Backfill completed successfully — all entries posted without errors.
settingsHub.profileSectionDesc: Basic settings for your organization and accounting.
settingsHub.generalSectionDesc: General settings for accounts, categories, tax codes and templates.
settingsHub.simpleCashSectionDesc: Tools for simple cash-based accounting: export and bank import.
settingsHub.dangerZoneDesc: Irreversible actions affecting all finance data.
settingsHub.resetFinanceDesc: Permanently deletes ALL finance data: transactions, invoices, payments, journal entries, accounts, categories, tax codes, bank imports, dunning notices, receipts, and the finance profile.
settingsHub.resetFinanceConfirmText: This action CANNOT be undone. All finance data will be permanently deleted.
settingsHub.resetFinanceSuccess: All finance data has been deleted.

profileSecurity.title: Security & Sessions
profileSecurity.description: Overview of your active sign-ins and devices. Details come from Keycloak and may be limited depending on your browser or identity provider.
profileSecurity.noSessions: No active sessions are currently registered.
profileSecurity.dataLimitsNote: Session and device data come from Keycloak and may be incomplete when the identity provider does not surface additional metadata.
profileSecurity.timeoutsNote: Sessions are also ended automatically when the Keycloak idle timeout (default 30 minutes of inactivity) or the maximum session lifetime (default 10 hours) is reached.
profileSecurity.adminEmpty: No active sessions are currently registered for this user.
profileSecurity.revokeConfirm: Really end this session? You will need to sign in again on that device.
profileSecurity.revokeConfirmAdmin: Really end this user's session? The user will need to sign in again on that device.
profileSecurity.revokeError: Could not end session. Please try again later.
profileSecurity.ipPrivacyNote: This information is only visible to you.
profileSecurity.ipPrivacyNoteAdmin: This IP address is shown only for administrative and security purposes.
